excerpt:
<details open>

ggml-openvino: Add GGML_BACKEND_DL_IMPL invocation for OpenVINO backend (#25795)

This adds the missing `GGML_BACKEND_DL_IMPL()` macro invocation, that other backends have.

Fixes #25586 for me

</details>

**Website:**
- <https://llama.app>

**macOS/iOS:**
- [macOS Apple Silicon (arm64)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b10077/llama-b10077-bin-macos-arm64.tar.gz)
- macOS Apple Silicon (arm64, KleidiAI enabled) [DISABLED](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/pull/23780)
- [macOS Intel (x64)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b10077/llama-b10077-bin-macos-x64.tar.gz)
- [iOS XCFramework](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b10077/llama-b10077-xcframework.zip)

**Linux:**
- [Ubuntu x64 (CPU)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b10077/llama-b10077-bin-ubuntu-x64.tar.gz)
- [Ubuntu arm64 (CPU)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b10077/llama-b10077-bin-ubuntu-arm64.tar.gz)
- [Ubuntu s390x (CPU)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b10077/llama-b10077-bin-ubuntu-s390x.tar.gz)
- [Ubuntu x64 (Vulkan)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases
